data.title: Bitcoin's price rebounded from $107,000 support, could encounter resistance at $112,000-$116,000. Altcoins to watch.
data.description: After hitting a support level of $107,000, Bitcoin has shown signs of recovery. However, analysts predict a challenging road ahead with strong resistance anticipated in the range of $112,000 to $116,000. There is speculation in the charts about the possibility of certain altcoins outperforming Bitcoin in the near future.

data.title: Bitcoin's bullish trend continues, but crucial thresholds indicate danger, according to Galaxy Digital analyst.
data.description: During a recent interview, the head of research at Galaxy Digital discussed the current state of Bitcoin, highlighting its significance at this juncture. The expert emphasized the factors that may influence Bitcoin's upcoming downturn, underscoring the critical nature of the present situation.
Monday FX Option Expiries

data.title: YuJa & Notre Dame to share strategies for scaling accessibility at EDUCAUSE 2025 using AI.
data.description: In San Jose, California, YuJa and the University of Notre Dame have announced a collaboration to showcase effective strategies for institutions looking to enhance their accessibility initiatives through the utilization of artificial intelligence. This partnership aims to provide practical insights on scaling accessibility efforts, offering valuable guidance for organizations looking to implement AI solutions in this area.

data.title: SSF.UN announces monthly distributions in Oct-Dec 2025 for Class A and Class U units of Symphony Floating Rate Senior Loan Fund.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, Brompton Funds disclosed monthly distributions for Symphony Floating Rate Senior Loan Fund's class A and class U units on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SSF.UN. The distributions will be applicable for record dates spanning from October to December 2025. This announcement encompasses all important details related to the distributions for investors and stakeholders.

data.title: Bishop Falls municipal workers, represented by CUPE 1349, ratify a new agreement after just days of bargaining, offering improved work-life balance, wages and pensions.
data.description: Bishop Falls municipal workers, represented by CUPE 1349, have overwhelmingly approved a tentative agreement after a brief negotiation period. The deal includes enhancements in work-life balance, wages, pensions, and job security. Tammie Greening, President of CUPE 1349, commended the town for their cooperative attitude during the bargaining process. This successful agreement reflects a positive outcome for the workers in Bishop Falls.

data.title: US to probe if China followed 2020 trade agreement, before meeting with Chinese officials; announcement made on Friday.
data.description: On Friday, the administration revealed its investigation into trade, to take place prior to a summit between leaders of the United States and China.

data.title: Brompton Wellington Square Investment Grade CLO ETF (TSX: BBBB, BBBB.U) announces distributions to unitholders on Nov 14, 2025.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, the Brompton Wellington Square Investment Grade CLO ETF (TSX: BBBB, BBBB.U) declared distributions for unitholders. The distributions will be payable on November 14, 2025, to those recorded as unitholders by the end of business on October 31, 2025.

data.title: Omega Healthcare Investors, Inc. declared a quarterly dividend of $0.67 per share on its common stock, payable on November 17, 2025.
data.description: In Hunt Valley, Maryland, Omega Healthcare Investors, Inc. (NYSE:OHI) declared a dividend of $0.67 per share on its common stock. The dividend will be paid on November 17, 2025, to common stockholders recorded by the end of business on November 3, 2025. Omega is a real estate investment trust specializing in long-term healthcare, focusing on skilled nursing and assisted living facilities.

data.title: Brompton Split Corp. Class A Share ETF increases monthly distribution to $0.13 per unit, a 13% annualized increase.
data.description: In Toronto on October 24, 2025, Brompton Funds (TSX: CLSA) reported significant growth in net asset value (NAV) since the launch of the Brompton Split Corp. Class A Share ETF. Consequently, they have raised the monthly distribution to $0.13 per unit for record dates spanning from October to December 2025. This adjustment reflects a notable 13% annualized increase from distributions in the third quarter.

data.title: "New Edition Way Tour" ft. New Edition, Boyz II Men & Toni Braxton kicks off Jan 29, 2026. Celebrates legacy & soul.
data.description: Houston will host The New Edition Way Tour starting on January 29, 2026, organized by The Black Promoters Collective (BPC). This unique tour combines the legacies, soul, and music of generations. The event, launching on October 24, 2025, promises to be an exceptional cross-country concert experience featuring three prominent artists.

data.title: Blue Ribbon Income Fund (TSX: RBN.UN) announces $0.04 monthly distributions per unit for Oct-Dec 2025.
data.description: In Toronto on October 24, 2025, the Blue Ribbon Income Fund (TSX: RBN.UN) disclosed a distribution update. The Fund will be issuing monthly distributions of $0.04 per unit for record dates spanning from October to December 2025.

data.title: Brompton Wellington Square AAA CLO ETF (TSX: BAAA, BAAA.U) declares distributions on Nov 14, 2025 to unitholders of record on Oct 31, 2025.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, the Brompton Wellington Square AAA CLO ETF (TSX: BAAA, BAAA.U) has declared distributions to be paid on November 14, 2025. These distributions will be issued to unitholders of record as of October 31, 2025.

data.title: Record $31 billion worth of Bitcoin options set to expire on Halloween, signaling a spooky season for traders after October's turbulence.
data.description: Despite experiencing a flash crash and deleveraging event in October, Bitcoin traders are anticipating a significant options expiry at the month's end. This event is set to break records in terms of trading volume and participation. The expiry is expected to involve a substantial number of options contracts and could potentially result in heightened market volatility and price fluctuations. Traders are advised to closely monitor the situation and prepare for potentially significant movements in the Bitcoin market.

data.title: Picard Medical, Inc. reassures investors, denies any undisclosed changes causing recent stock price fluctuations.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, in Tucson, Arizona, Picard Medical, Inc. (NYSE American: PMI), the parent company of SynCardia Systems LLC, the creator of the first commercially-approved total artificial heart in the U.S. and Canada, stated that there has been no hidden significant alteration in the company's activities or financial situation that could explain the recent instability in its stock value.

data.title: Fannie Mae (FNMA) to report Q3 2025 results on Oct 29th. Webcast planned to discuss. Washington, Oct 24th, 2025.
data.description: Fannie Mae (OTCQB: FNMA) is set to release its financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on Wednesday, October 29, 2025. The report will be made public before the opening of U.S. financial markets. A webcast is scheduled where company executives will discuss the quarterly results. This event will provide investors and analysts with insights into Fannie Mae's performance during this period. Keep an eye out for the specific financial figures that will be disclosed during this webcast.
